title: Ansible WinRM Transport Errors Clustering
dataSources: Windows automation results with transport errors in `ansible:result` / callbacks
spl:
index=iac sourcetype="ansible:result" OR sourcetype="ansible:callback"
| search "winrm" OR "WSMan" OR "ssl" OR "certificate"
| stats count by host, playbook, status
| where count>=5
| sort -count
description: WinRM failures block patching and compliance baselines on Windows estates.
value: Groups recurring certificate and listener errors for fast Windows admin triage.
implementation: Include `ansible_winrm_*` variables in HEC payload for correlation.
visualization: Table (host × error class), Map (if geo fields exist).

references.title: AWX logging integration (job events, activity stream)

knownFalsePositives: Alerts from scheduled scans, pilot repositories, or vendor API throttling during bulk operations.
grandmaExplanation: We watch infrastructure-as-code runs and policy so changes to systems stay visible and governed.
